records.question: Which courses named ml have sections with the description qui?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT courses.course_id FROM courses
JOIN sections ON courses.course_id = sections.course_id
JOIN student_enrolment_courses ON courses.course_id = student_enrolment_courses.course_id
WHERE courses.course_name = 'ml' AND sections.section_description = 'qui'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.course_id FROM Courses AS T1 INNER JOIN Sections AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id WHERE T1.course_name = 'ml' AND T2.section_description = 'qui'

records.question: Which courses with the name la and description n were offered in the summer 2010 semester where the semester description is exactly g?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT courses.course_id FROM courses
JOIN student_enrolment_courses ON courses.course_id = student_enrolment_courses.course_id
JOIN student_enrolment ON student_enrolment_courses.student_enrolment_id = student_enrolment.student_enrolment_id
JOIN semesters ON student_enrolment.semester_id = semesters.semester_id
WHERE semesters.semester_description = 'g' AND courses.course_name = 'la' AND semesters.semester_name = 'summer 2010' AND courses.course_description = 'n'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.course_id FROM Courses AS T1 INNER JOIN Student_Enrolment_Courses AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id INNER JOIN Student_Enrolment AS T3 ON T2.student_enrolment_id = T3.student_enrolment_id INNER JOIN Semesters AS T4 ON T3.semester_id = T4.semester_id WHERE T1.course_name LIKE '%la%' AND T1.course_description LIKE '%n%' AND T4.semester_name = 'summer 2010' AND T4.semester_description = 'g'

records.question: What courses is the student with email address gracie29@example.com enrolled in?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT courses.course_id FROM courses
JOIN student_enrolment_courses ON courses.course_id = student_enrolment_courses.course_id
JOIN student_enrolment ON student_enrolment_courses.student_enrolment_id = student_enrolment.student_enrolment_id
JOIN students ON student_enrolment.student_id = students.student_id
WHERE students.email_address = 'gracie29@example.com'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T3.course_id FROM Students AS T1 INNER JOIN Student_Enrolment AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id INNER JOIN Student_Enrolment_Courses AS T3 ON T2.student_enrolment_id = T3.student_enrolment_id WHERE T1.email_address = 'gracie29@example.com'

records.question: Which courses have a section where the section name is g?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT courses.course_id FROM courses
JOIN sections ON courses.course_id = sections.course_id
WHERE sections.section_name = 'g'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.course_id FROM Courses AS T1 INNER JOIN Sections AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id WHERE T2.section_name = 'g'

records.question: Which courses have a description that is exactly 'v'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT courses.course_id FROM courses
JOIN student_enrolment_courses ON courses.course_id = student_enrolment_courses.course_id
JOIN student_enrolment ON student_enrolment_courses.student_enrolment_id = student_enrolment.student_enrolment_id
WHERE courses.course_description = 'v'
records.pred_sql: SELECT course_id FROM Courses WHERE course_description = 'v'

records.question: Which math courses with a description exactly q were taken by students whose SSN is 39, other details are nesciunt, email is qo'kon@example.com, and who left on or after 1990-09-01 05:03:27?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT courses.course_id FROM courses
JOIN student_enrolment_courses ON courses.course_id = student_enrolment_courses.course_id
JOIN student_enrolment ON student_enrolment_courses.student_enrolment_id = student_enrolment.student_enrolment_id
JOIN students ON student_enrolment.student_id = students.student_id
WHERE courses.course_description = 'q' AND students.ssn = '39' AND courses.course_name = 'math' AND students.other_student_details = 'nesciunt' AND students.date_left >= '1990-09-01 05:03:27' AND students.email_address = 'qo''kon@example.com'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.course_id FROM Courses AS T1 INNER JOIN Student_Enrolment_Courses AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id INNER JOIN Student_Enrolment AS T3 ON T2.student_enrolment_id = T3.student_enrolment_id INNER JOIN Students AS T4 ON T3.student_id = T4.student_id WHERE T1.course_name LIKE '%math%' AND T1.course_description = 'q' AND T4.ssn = '39' AND T4.other_student_details = 'nesciunt' AND T4.email_address = 'qo''kon@example.com' AND T4.date_left >= '1990-09-01 05:03:27'

records.question: Which courses named math with a description of q have a section named b with a section description of voluptatem?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT courses.course_id FROM courses
JOIN sections ON courses.course_id = sections.course_id
JOIN student_enrolment_courses ON courses.course_id = student_enrolment_courses.course_id
WHERE courses.course_description = 'q' AND courses.course_name = 'math' AND sections.section_name = 'b' AND sections.section_description = 'voluptatem'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.course_id FROM Courses AS T1 INNER JOIN Sections AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id WHERE T1.course_name = 'math' AND T1.course_description = 'q' AND T2.section_name = 'b' AND T2.section_description = 'voluptatem'
